scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build:cloudflare: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.test:unit: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
